headline: Netflix Turns Chef’s Table Into Live Events To Deepen Investor Story
summary: Netflix, ticker NasdaqGS:NFLX, has entered a multi year partnership with American Express and restaurant platform Resy. The deal extends the Chef’s Table series into live, ticketed experiences, including curated dinners, festivals and awards style events. American Express cardholders are expected to receive access to exclusive Chef’s Table themed culinary events across select cities. NasdaqGS:NFLX is trading at $98.66, with the share price up 5.6% over the past week and 8.4% year to date...
